subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath manifested the Most Great Name, despite the nations that denied His proof and His testimony [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر الاسم الاعظم رغما للامم الذین انکروا حجه الله و برهانه و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God
